title: [ESI] Lowering the Capnp encoder/decoder ops
body:
This is the final step to support basic cosimulation. It is large but contains the final lowerings and fixes to get this feature working. As of now, it doesn't produce value RTL due to #438. When I enable the mitigation mentioned in the issue, cosimulation works perfectly in both Verilator and Questa.

- Adds clocks and resets to the encoder/decoder. They're combinational but asserts in SV are apparently not and the lowerings emit them.
- Adds an unwrap-wrap conversion pattern. This is just the converse of the wrap-unwrap removal already there. Necessary in conditions where the unwrap isn't preceded by the wrap.
- Adds the encoder / decoder lowering passes which call out to the separate ESICapnp library, if libcapnp is present at build time.
- Adds encoder and decoder builder routines to the `TypeSchema` class. These classes slice and dice a bunch of bits to obtain the payload: a single integer!
- Misc fixes, checks, and changes.

Sorry about the rather long PR.
